seo.title: Product Comparison Image – Side-by-Side Product Visuals | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create clear product comparison images with AI. Infographic maker for Amazon and A+ content Amazon—generate side-by-side visuals that highlight differences between products.

hero.title: Product Comparison Image
hero.description: Turn product data and photos into clear comparison visuals with AI. Quickly generate side-by-side images that explain differences between models, bundles, or plans so customers can decide faster.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe the products or variants you want to compare

steps.title: Describe what you want to compare
steps.description: Start with a short brief about the products, variants, or bundles you want to compare, and what differences matter most—such as price, features, or use cases.

steps.title: Provide product visuals or references
steps.description: Optionally upload product photos or reference assets so the workflow can keep visual consistency between compared items.

steps.title: Generate AI-powered comparison images
steps.description: The workflow arranges your products into side-by-side or grid-based comparison images, with clear structure that highlights key differences.

steps.title: Select layouts and export for your channels
steps.description: Choose the comparison layouts you like best, iterate if needed, then export high-resolution assets for product pages, landing pages, and ads.

whoIsFor.title: For teams who need visual product comparisons
whoIsFor.subtitle: Ideal for e-commerce, SaaS, and marketing teams that explain choices to customers.

audiences.label: E-commerce and marketplace teams
audiences.description: Create comparison images that help shoppers quickly see differences between models, bundles, or competing options.

audiences.label: Product marketing and growth teams
audiences.description: Turn feature matrices and spec sheets into simple visuals for landing pages, pitch decks, and ad creatives.

audiences.label: SaaS and subscription products
audiences.description: Visualize plan or tier differences in an image format that is easy to reuse across channels.

audiences.label: Agencies and designers

items.question: What is the Product Comparison Image workflow?
items.answer: Product Comparison Image is an AI workflow that helps you create side-by-side comparison visuals for products, variants, bundles, or plans. It turns structured information and references into clear comparison images.

items.question: What inputs work best for this workflow?
items.answer: A concise description of each product or variant, plus any available product photos, works best. The more clearly you describe what you want to highlight, the better the comparison visuals will match your intent.

items.question: Can I use this for non-physical products?
items.answer: Yes. You can use Product Comparison Image for SaaS plans, service packages, digital products, and more—anywhere you need to visually explain differences between options.

items.question: Where can I use the generated comparison images?
items.answer: You can use them on product detail pages, pricing or comparison pages, in email campaigns, paid ads, and social media posts where a quick visual comparison is helpful.

items.question: Can I match my brand style in the comparison images?
items.answer: You can guide the workflow toward your brand look by describing colors, styling, and tone in your prompt. For stricter brand control, you can also treat the outputs as drafts and refine them in your own design tools.

items.question: How is pricing handled for this workflow?
items.answer: Each run consumes credits based on the underlying image generation steps. It is priced to make it practical to experiment with multiple layouts before choosing final comparison visuals.
